model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ daca_eligible + treatment + C(year) + C(statefip) + age_on_june_15_2012 + I(age_on_june_15_2012 ** 2) + female + in_school + hs_or_more + UNEMP + EVERIFY + DRIVERSLICENSES", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
